passive_tree_principles.core_philosophy: Shop like the engine: maximum life is the primary stat (defense + fuel + damage). When two routes cost the same, pick the one passing through life.
priority_order: Priority 3: Crit Damage Bonus (stacks with Gore Spike)
Priority 6: Life Recovery & Flask (replaces leech post-0.5)
passive_tree_principles.budget_principle: Unreserved life must absorb several consecutive casts + one nasty hit. If casting twice while clipped by boss slam would kill you, respec crit for life.

life_wheel_ranger.priority: TIER_0 - always take if pathing efficient

life_wheel_witch.priority: TIER_0 - always take if pathing efficient

spell_crit_cluster.priority: TIER_1 - stack until ~50% total (15% base + tree + gear)
spell_crit_cluster.note: Diminishing returns near cap; crit chance plateaus

crit_damage_cluster.priority: TIER_1 - stack after chance floor (50%) is solid

spell_damage_cluster.priority: TIER_2 - front-load early, respec late if crowded
spell_damage_cluster.scaling: Good value early; diminishing late (hard caps on scaling)

curse_effect_cluster.priority: TIER_2 - mid/late game; deepens Despair resistance cut

flask_recovery_cluster.yield: +30-50% flask charge recovery, +20-30% flask recovery rate
flask_recovery_cluster.priority: TIER_2_TO_1 - life-spend class makes this critical post-0.5
flask_recovery_cluster.note: Do NOT skip; replaces leech as sustain layer

jewel_sockets.pathing_rule: Allocate if one point off-path; jewels rebalance per patch (no tree respec needed)
jewel_sockets.jewel_stats: Life % + crit multi is dream combo (both feed Gore Spike math)

pathfinding_rules.rule_1_life_preference: When two routes cost the same, pick the one passing through life
pathfinding_rules.rule_2_jewel_sockets: Allocate 1-point-off-path jewel sockets; jewels are respec-insurance
pathfinding_rules.rule_3_cast_speed_sprinkle: Cheap cast speed nodes are QoL; sprinkle in when available (accelerates two-beat rhythm)
pathfinding_rules.rule_4_avoid_traps: Avoid pure attribute nodes unless needed for gear requirements; plan attributes early
pathfinding_rules.rule_5_cluster_efficiency: Cluster pathing matters: if cluster requires 8 points for 5 useful nodes, reconsider vs. alternative

level_24.example_path: Scion start → life wheel → right side spell damage

level_41.example_path: previous + Ranger life wheel OR Witch spell damage cluster

level_60.example_path: previous + crit damage cluster + curse effect start

level_70.recommended_stats: +350-400 life, +100% spell damage, +50% crit chance, +30% crit multiplier
level_70.example_path: previous + flask recovery cluster + jewel socket

level_90.recommended_stats: +500-600 life, +120-150% spell damage, +60% crit chance, +80% crit multiplier, +40% curse effect
level_90.example_path: Min 3 life wheels, 2-3 crit clusters, flask recovery layer, jewels

avoided: Keystones that lock you into one mechanic (Scion start doesn't naturally pass keystones anyway)
Energy-shield primaries (blood mage pays to bleed, not shield)

checklist: ✓ Allocated Sunder the Flesh (ascendancy crit floor)
✓ Allocated Whispers of the Flesh (curse regen shutdown)
✓ Allocated Crimson Power or Vitality Siphon (ascendancy complete)

tree_vs_gear_tradeoff.principle: Tree provides % scaling; gear provides flat stats + cap floors (resistances, attributes)
tree_vs_gear_tradeoff.life_acquisition: Tree + gear together; roughly 60% life from tree, 40% from gear at endgame
tree_vs_gear_tradeoff.crit_floor: Must hit 50% crit chance total; tree provides foundation, gear/supports seal it
tree_vs_gear_tradeoff.example_decision: If missing 20% crit chance: tree is cheaper overall; if missing 50 life, gear is faster to fix

tree_respec_insurance: Keep 1-2 respecs in reserve for patch pivots
If keystones shift, jewel respec is cheaper than full tree respec
